package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for test_fixture_builders_live_in_production_packages: Fixture and factory helpers defined in non-test production files.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule200NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule200NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule200NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario200Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule200NegativeService, input Rule200NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
